languages.text: "Постарайтесь захотеть в ближайшее время. Чем дольше мы летим, тем больше преступников остается без моего внимания". {n}Проктор Антар кивает вам, быстро отдает честь и вместе с Глейто покидает мостик.{/n}

"I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Постарайтесь захотеть в ближайшее время. Чем дольше мы летим, тем больше преступников остается без моего внимания". {n}Проктор Антар кивает вам, быстро отдает честь и вместе с Глейто покидает мостик.{/n}

"I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

languages.text: «Espero que esas circunstancias se den pronto. Cuanto más largo sea nuestro viaje, más criminales campan a sus anchas sin mi supervisión». {n}Solomorne se despide con un gesto de cabeza y un rápido saludo militar y se marcha, seguido de Glaito.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Espero que esas circunstancias se den pronto. Cuanto más largo sea nuestro viaje, más criminales campan a sus anchas sin mi supervisión». {n}Solomorne se despide con un gesto de cabeza y un rápido saludo militar y se marcha, seguido de Glaito.{/n}

languages.text: “希望合适的时机尽快到来。我们离开得越久，不受我监管的罪犯就会越多。”{n}索罗蒙向你点了点头，快速行了个礼，离开了。格雷托跟在他身后走了出去。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “希望合适的时机尽快到来。我们离开得越久，不受我监管的罪犯就会越多。”{n}索罗蒙向你点了点头，快速行了个礼，离开了。格雷托跟在他身后走了出去。{/n}

languages.text: « Le plus tôt sera le mieux. Plus mon absence se prolongera, plus nombreux seront les criminels à en profiter pour sévir en toute impunité. » {n}Solomorne vous adresse un bref salut de la tête avant de prendre congé, Glaito sur les talons.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le plus tôt sera le mieux. Plus mon absence se prolongera, plus nombreux seront les criminels à en profiter pour sévir en toute impunité. » {n}Solomorne vous adresse un bref salut de la tête avant de prendre congé, Glaito sur les talons.{/n}

languages.text: 「こうした状況がすぐに訪れることを望みます。旅が長くなればなるほど、より多くの犯罪者が私の監督なしでさまよい歩くことになるでしょう」{n}ソロモーンはあなたにうなずき、素早い敬礼を与え、グライトが彼のすぐあとに続いて去る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「こうした状況がすぐに訪れることを望みます。旅が長くなればなるほど、より多くの犯罪者が私の監督なしでさまよい歩くことになるでしょう」{n}ソロモーンはあなたにうなずき、素早い敬礼を与え、グライトが彼のすぐあとに続いて去る。{/n}

languages.text: "Umarım şartlar en yakın zamanda elverir. Yolculuğumuz uzadıkça nezaretimin yokluğunda daha çok suçlu serbestçe ortalıkta dolaşacak." {n}Solomorne seni başıyla selamlıyor ve Glaito'yu da ardına takıp ortamdan ayrılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Umarım şartlar en yakın zamanda elverir. Yolculuğumuz uzadıkça nezaretimin yokluğunda daha çok suçlu serbestçe ortalıkta dolaşacak." {n}Solomorne seni başıyla selamlıyor ve Glaito'yu da ardına takıp ortamdan ayrılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hoffe, diese Umstände treten bald ein. Je länger unsere Reise dauert, desto mehr Kriminelle entziehen sich meiner Überwachung." {n}Solomorne nickt dir zu, salutiert und wendet sich mit Glaito im Schlepptau ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope those circumstances arrive soon. The longer our journey, the more criminals are left wandering about without my supervision." {n}Solomorne nods at you, gives a quick salute, and leaves with Glaito at his heel.{/n}
